label: string_true
note: String that looks like a valid boolean — checks coercion

label: random_string
note: Arbitrary non-boolean string — must be rejected

label: integer_1
note: Integer instead of boolean — may be coerced

label: integer_0
note: Integer instead of boolean — may be coerced

label: no_value
note: Field present but no value. Query -> `field=`; body -> omit

label: missing_field
note: Field key entirely absent everywhere. Tests missing parameter

label: duplicate_param
note: Send the parameter twice with valid value. Query -> field=<valid>&field=<valid>; skipped for body. Expected result is API-dependent
